prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次为约11925→12251→11199→11037→13949名，2021–2024年整体在11000–12200区间窄幅波动，2025年大幅后移约2912名至13949，创 近五年最低位次新低，显示当年报考热度明显下降；该校在重庆物理类计划数持续增长：2021年37人→2022年41人→2023年41人→2024年45人→2025年46人→2026年 50人，2026年较2025年扩招4人（+8.7%），扩招幅度为近年最大，对竞争有缓和作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京化工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排 名近年稳中有升：2021年第62名→2022年第64名→2023年第64名→2024年第68名→2025年第63名→2026年第57名，2026年排名升至近六年最高，学校综合实力和声誉持续提升；2024年声誉评价为中性/混合（师德事件已处理）；抖音学校热度总排名第7（高热），综合热度约740万，在211高校中曝光度极高，张雪峰等升学规划师多次推荐该校 为"性价比很高的211"，报考关注度处于高位。无投档断档或录取异常记录；第五轮学科评估：化学工程与技术A、化学A-、材料科学与工程A-，三个主干学科均 为A类，在化工、材料领域具有显著学科优势，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校核心招生专业（化工、材料、化学等）属于"生化环材"大类，社会舆 论持续明显劝退，可能抑制部分考生报考意愿；但计算机类、自动化类、大数据双学位等热门方向热度较高，形成内部冷热分化。重庆2026年物理类考生约13.7万（按近年65.5% 占比估算），较2025年13.95万微降约0.2%，竞争压力基本持平；该校位于北京市，非重庆本地院校，无本地招生倾斜；跨省报 考需考虑地域偏好，北京高校对西南考生仍具一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026年扩招8.7%的缓和作用、软科排名升至第57名的利好、抖 音高热带来的关注度提升，以及生化环材类专业的持续劝退氛围，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年小幅回升（位次数字减小），预测最低位次约14477名，区间13977–14977名 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were approximately 11925 → 12251 → 11199 → 11037 → 13949, respectively. From 2021 to 2024, the overall range fluctuated narrowly between 11000 and 12200. In 2025, the ranking significantly dropped by about 2912 places to 13949, setting a new five-year low, indicating a notable decline in application popularity that year. The university's enrollment plan for the Physics Category in Chongqing has been continuously increasing: 37 in 2021 → 41 in 2022 → 41 in 2023 → 45 in 2024 → 46 in 2025 → 50 in 2026. In 2026, there is an expansion of 4 students (+8.7%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion rate in recent years, which will help ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years: 62nd in 2021 → 64th in 2022 → 64th in 2023 → 68th in 2024 → 63rd in 2025 → 57th in 2026. The 2026 ranking is the highest in the past six years, reflecting continuous improvement in the university's comprehensive strength and reputation. In 2024, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (teacher ethics incident has been handled). The university's overall popularity on Douyin ranks 7th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of about 7.4 million, indicating extremely high exposure among 211 universities. Education planners like Zhang Xuefeng have repeatedly recommended this university as a '211 with high cost-performance ratio,' so application attention remains high. There are no records of admission interruptions or anomalies. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Chemistry A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-. The three main disciplines are all A-class, giving the university significant disciplinary advantages in chemical engineering and materials, strongly attracting students interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's core enrollment majors (chemical engineering, materials, chemistry, etc.) belong to the 'biology, chemistry, environment, materials' category, which has been continuously and significantly discouraged by public opinion, potentially suppressing some students' willingness to apply. However, popular directions such as Computer Science, Automation, and Big Data dual degrees have high heat, creating internal differentiation between cold and hot majors. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing is about 137,000 (estimated based on the recent 65.5% proportion), a slight decrease of about 0.2% from 139,500 in 2025, so competition pressure is roughly the same. The university is located in Beijing, not a local institution in Chongqing, so there is no local enrollment preference. Cross-province applications need to consider regional preferences; Beijing universities still have a certain appeal to students from the southwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the easing effect of the 8.7% enrollment expansion in 2026, the positive impact of the Soft Science ranking rising to 57th, the increased attention from high Douyin heat, and the continued discouraging atmosphere for biology, chemistry, environment, and materials majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for the Physics Category in 2026 will slightly recover (ranking number decreases) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 14477, with a range of 13977–14977.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 14477, with a range of 13977–14977. It is recommended that students with rankings within 13500 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Hongde Academy, Computer Science, etc.); students with rankings between 14000–15000 should mainly choose Tier 2 majors (Outstanding Engineer College, dual degree programs, etc.) while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors; students with rankings above 15000 should use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also paying attention to opportunities brought by the enrollment expansion. Although the university's traditional advantageous disciplines like chemical engineering and materials have low social heat, their disciplinary strength is strong, making them suitable for students with a clear interest in related fields.
